title: Modernize streamy: remove unused broadcasts, direct_messages, utils, and dead code
description: Remove all unused modules and dead code from the streamy package. Specifically: (1) Delete entire lib/broadcasts/ directory (3 files) — Streamy.broadcast() and BroadCasts.allow() never called. (2) Delete entire lib/direct_messages/ directory (3 files) — Streamy.sessions()/sessionsForUsers() never called, apps use Streamy.sockets()+emit() directly. (3) Remove userId() and user() from utils_client.js and utils_server.js — never called, keep only Streamy.id(). (4) Remove reactive-var dependency from package.js — only used by dead userId tracking. (5) Remove Streamy._usersId, Accounts.onLogin hook, logout sniffing hack, and socketsForUsers() from core_server.js. (6) Remove Streamy.close() from core_client.js. (7) Remove Streamy.BroadCasts and Streamy.DirectMessages from namespaces.js. (8) Delete examples/chat/ directory. (9) Clean up hasOwnProperty patterns in connection.js. (10) Update CHANGELOG.md with a v2.1.0 entry documenting the cleanup. (11) Bump version to 2.1.0 in package.js and package.json.
closeReason: Removed lib/broadcasts/, lib/direct_messages/, examples/chat/; stripped dead code from core_server, core_client, utils, namespaces; removed reactive-var dep; cleaned hasOwnProperty in connection.js; bumped to v2.1.0; updated CHANGELOG
